sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20207" key="bohdromi/h" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βοηδρομ-ίη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n20207.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">helping, aiding</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:381" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">381</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
